mapper.select: /* wif-das-robotpackcomplete-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotpackcomplete-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotpackcomplete-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasPackCompleteResultItemSeq - RobotDAS 포장완료 Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_pakcompl_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
